changelog: Fixed: Workout download on mobile – added Capacitor Filesystem/Share support so downloads work on iOS and Android.
Fixed: Exercise reordering on mobile – registered TouchSensor alongside PointerSensor for drag-and-drop on touch devices.
Feature: Circular download progress indicator – download button now shows an animated SVG progress ring while building the ZIP.
Fixed: Toast push cleanup – streamlined toast.push({message, kind}) calls in download flow.
